top_signals.title: BOK Warns of Risks From Single-Stock Leveraged ETFs: Yonhap
top_signals.summary: The Bank of Korea warned that single-stock leveraged exchange-traded funds tied to Samsung Electronics Co. and SK Hynix Inc. could deepen market concentration, amplify volatility and intensify one-way trading flows, according to a local report.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Iran begins six-day funeral for Ayatollah Khamenei nearly four months after his death
top_signals.summary: Iran plans a six-day funeral for Ayatollah Ali Khamenei, with ceremonies across Iran and Iraq before burial in Mashhad.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.
